title: Pre-final: full story
text: Once upon a time in a small house there lived a brave little mouse. He helped his friends. He shared his food. He told funny stories. Everyone loved him. The end!

tips.target: Once upon a time in a small house there lived a brave little mouse. He
helped his friends. He shared his food. He told funny stories. Everyone loved him. The end!

character_tips.anna: Full mini-story. Like the block final, but easier.
character_tips.knopych: 📖 ONE STORY TO RULE THEM ALL — almost!
character_tips.klavochka: Such a sweet story, my hero 🐭💕
